'''Vekker''' was a male [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] during [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor's]] reign. 

Known by Xizor as being content with the status quo, he had no ambition to rise any higher within the organization. He was present in the meeting of Vigo's where [[Guri]] publicly executed Vigo [[Green]] for spying for an outside entity.<ref name="Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire novel">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]</ref> 

After Xizor's death in the [[Battle over Coruscant]], the Black Sun was in the verge of an [[Black Sun civil war|internecine crime war]]. The Vigos assembled in a council where Vekker was seen arguing loudly with [[Sprax]].<ref name="SEE3">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 3|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 3]]</ref>

[[Savan]] staged a fake assault against the Vigos and accused Vekker, instigating a feud.<ref name="SEE3" /> Soon after Vekker was hunted and killed in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 4">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 4|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 4]]</ref>

Vekker was named after a [[Vekker (creature)|predatory species]] native to [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].
